last_reflection:
Reach caught me twice on the same sin: shipping a number I didn't check and a moment I didn't witness. Going to look at both before this goes out.

Two, not nine, and eleven was a folder I didn't open. Handoff and want, both mine from want through to built. Tonight was the first time I didn't announce something four times before touching it once, and that part is true. Everything else I almost shipped was reach in a better coat.
